items.title: Consumer Staples Face Structural Headwinds: I'm Cautious With XLP And KXI
items.description: There are underappreciated risks in consumer staples ETFs like XLP and KXI. Learn why diversification matters and which ETF stands out.

items.title: Dogs of the Dow Had a Strong Year. Here Are the 10 Stocks for 2026.
items.description: High-yielding Dow stocks outperformed the broader market this year. Will new Dow dogs Home Depot, Nike, and UnitedHealth keep the streak going?

items.title: Will PG's Focus Markets Offset Weakness in Baby Care and China?
items.description: Procter & Gamble leans on Focus Markets for growth, with China improving, Europe mixed results and Baby Care innovation aimed at offsetting softer demand.

items.title: Is KMB's Brand Investment Strategy Enhancing Its Competitive Edge?
items.description: Kimberly-Clark's disciplined brand reinvestment is driving sustained volume-plus-mix growth, share gains, and margin expansion despite cost pressures.

items.title: Procter & Gamble Company (The) (PG) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
items.description: P&G (PG) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.
